title: Concierge Service Excellence Model for Egyptian Hotels
trigger: Guest requests concierge service for personalized assistance or local recommendations.

steps.title: Initial Guest Interaction
steps.action: Greet the guest warmly and inquire about their specific needs or requests. Use the PMS to check guest details for personalized service.

steps.title: Assess Guest Needs
steps.action: Listen carefully to the guest's requirements and ask clarifying questions if needed. Determine if the request involves local recommendations, reservations, or special arrangements.

steps.title: Provide Local Recommendations
steps.action: Offer tailored recommendations for dining, attractions, and activities based on the guest's preferences and current local events. Use the hotel's curated list of partners and local attractions.

steps.title: Make Reservations
steps.action: Contact the desired venue or service provider to make reservations on behalf of the guest. Confirm details with the guest and update the PMS with reservation information.

steps.title: Arrange Special Services
steps.action: Coordinate with relevant departments (e.g., housekeeping, F&B) to arrange special services such as in-room dining, spa appointments, or transportation. Confirm arrangements with the guest.

steps.title: Follow-Up and Feedback
steps.action: After the service has been provided, follow up with the guest to ensure satisfaction. Solicit feedback to improve future services and update guest preferences in the PMS.

description: This playbook outlines the concierge service model for hotels in Egypt, focusing on delivering exceptional guest experiences through personalized service and local expertise.
prerequisites: Concierge staff must be trained in local culture and attractions.
Access to the PMS and guest profiles.
escalation_path: If guest requests cannot be fulfilled, escalate to the Guest Relations Manager.
